generation_request.world_name_style: cozy, whimsical, slightly dramatic, socially tense

karma_system.ascend: Helping others, protecting someone, telling the truth, standing up for others, repairing relationships
karma_system.descend: Spreading rumors, betrayal, cheating, manipulation, exclusion, humiliation
karma_system.important_note: An action can Ascend globally while upsetting one NPC, or Descend globally while pleasing another NPC.

relationship_system.description: NPC relationships are local memory tracked per NPC/player pair.

available_locations.story_function: main social hub where gossip spreads
private life, secrets, friendships, and betrayal

npc_requirements: Each NPC must have a secret
Each NPC must have at least 2 relationship biases
Each NPC must have a pressure point
Each NPC must react differently to Ascend and Descend players
quest_requirements: Each quest must support at least 3 approaches
At least one approach should involve gossip or social manipulation
At least one approach should be morally messy
Each quest must affect karma and at least one NPC relationship
At least one quest should involve betrayal, rumor, or mistaken identity
At least one quest should use an object in multiple ways
object_requirements: Objects should be usable as tool, evidence, gossip material, bribe, prank item, clue, or mistake
Avoid single-purpose quest items when possible

generation_instruction: Using this form, generate one new boarding school Karma world instance. Do not change location IDs or required building types. Create changing NPCs, factions, quests, secrets, relationships, oddities, and karma hooks. Output valid JSON only.
